item.name: Petit Pteranodon
item.description:
It might be cute now, but wait till it grows and becomes a scourge of the skies.

Use item to acquire the petit pteranodon minion.
item.tooltip:
When is a dinosaur
not a dinosaur?
   - Folk Riddle
item.specialactiondescription:
Increases action party movement speed by 30%.
Duration: 10s
